chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D-1830 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.7885/2023 2. For hearing of main case. 21.08.2024 Syed Zafar Ali Shah, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, AAG along with Jameel Ahmed Channa, AEO on behalf of DEO Primary Sukkur and Athar Hussain Qureshi, AEO (ES&HS), Sukkur ***************** Learned AAG has filed statement along with certain documents to show that petitioners No.1 to 8 and 12 have been recommended; however, remaining petitioners appearing at Sr. No.8 to 11, who secured lesser marks, would be considered by concerned department as per policy notified by the Government up to 28.02.2025. Counsel is satisfied and seeks disposal of instant petition in the terms that remaining petitioners, who are waiting for their appointment orders for the post of Primary School Teacher, would be considered under aforesaid policy. Order accordingly. Accordingly, instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms. Let a copy of this order be communicated to the office of Additional Advocate General, Sindh for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Faisal Mumtaz/PS
